projects.name: plastron
projects.tagline: A polyglot reactive substrate — cells hold values, formulas, or compiled lambdas in any language a compiler is installed for. Live at plastron.ca.

projects.name: RheoServ Waumpaum
projects.tagline: An offline-first credit-union core in one encrypted HTML file: cr-sqlite CRDT merge across operators and waumpaum settlement between institutions.

projects.name: Offline Protected-B HRIS
projects.tagline: A Protected-B HRIS that runs offline in a single HTML file, merging HR records across operators with CRDT SQLite.

projects.name: xit-wasm-ts
projects.tagline: Versioned in-memory archives via xit (a Zig VCS) compiled to WebAssembly.

projects.name: The Colonial Advocate
projects.tagline: A single-page web app modelled after William Lyon Mackenzie's 19th-century reform newspaper.

projects.name: Firearms vs Homicide
projects.tagline: Civilian firearm ownership (Small Arms Survey 2017) charted against intentional homicide rates (UNODC), by country.

projects.name: xit
projects.tagline: A git alternative written in Zig.

projects.name: genenote-js
projects.tagline: Lion Kimbra's genenote, reimplemented in JavaScript on top of plastron.

projects.name: pycard
projects.tagline: A HyperCard-inspired toolkit built with tkinter and Python.
